description: Producer submits a publish request where signature.key_id's DID portion does not equal body.agent_id. Registry MUST reject with key_not_authorized (HTTP 403) per RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 6. This catches the case where one agent attempts to publish content claiming a different agent's identity, but signs with their own key.

input.notes: body.agent_id = did:web:agents.example.com:alice; signature.key_id = did:web:agents.example.com:bob#key-1. The DID portion of key_id (did:web:agents.example.com:bob) does not equal agent_id (did:web:agents.example.com:alice). Registry MUST reject before even attempting signature verification.
